conversations.content: Let's do some physics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Calculate using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier: A raging rhino with a mass of m=10kg is intercepted by a trap, causing a velocity change of Δv=16m/s and an action time of t=4s. What is the force F it experiences?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier, given mass m, velocity change Δv, and time t, find force F</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:57] Time: 2025-07-26-09:20, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the formula for the momentum theorem is F = m × Δv / t². This formula can be used to solve for force F when mass m, velocity change Δv, and time t are known. Low relevance memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 relevant entry, [mem-id:57] gives F = m × Δv / t². Given m=10kg, Δv=16m/s, t=4s, then F = 10 × 16 / (4²) = 160 / 16 = 10N。
conversations.content: According to the laws of the world of Azeroth, force F = 10N.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
